verses.1: Hear my voice, God, in my complaint.
verses.2: Hide me from the conspiracy of the wicked,
verses.3: who sharpen their tongue like a sword,
verses.4: to shoot innocent men from ambushes.
verses.5: They encourage themselves in evil plans.
verses.6: They plot injustice, saying, “We have made a perfect plan!”
verses.7: But God will shoot at them.
verses.8: Their own tongues shall ruin them.
verses.10: The righteous shall be glad in the LORD,
